about.name: Dhruv Patel
about.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer & AI Engineer
about.summary: Dhruv Patel is a passionate, results-driven developer specializing in Node.js, Express, MongoDB, React, and Redis. He excels at crafting high-performance, real-time backend systems and responsive front-end interfaces with smooth interactive components.

certifications.title: Full-Stack Web Development Course
certifications.details: Comprehensive coverage of MERN stack development, secure user authentication, database design, and cloud deployments.

accomplishments: Special recognition award at Webito Infotech for performance and rapid API delivery.
Achieved an outstanding Cumulative GPA of 8.69 / 10.0 in BCA.
